word: G209 - ἀκωλύτως - akōlýtōs - ak-o-loo'-toce - No man forbidding him

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: No man forbidding him
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb from a compound of G1 (as a negative particle) and a derivative of G2967; in an unhindered manner, that is, freely: - no man forbidding him.
